compiled_state.title: RED: Write failing tests for EAGAIN safety net in record-test-status.sh
compiled_state.author: Main
compiled_state.description:
## Description

Create tests/hooks/test-record-test-status-eagain.sh with behavioral tests for EAGAIN detection in record-test-status.sh. Tests use RECORD_TEST_STATUS_RUNNER override to simulate exit code 254 with EAGAIN stderr patterns. All tests MUST fail (RED) before implementation.

Mock runner approach: create temp scripts that echo EAGAIN patterns to stdout (captured via 2>&1 into test_output_file) and exit with the specified code.

## Test Scenarios

1. test_eagain_exit254_with_stderr_pattern: Mock runner exits 254, outputs "fork: Resource temporarily unavailable". Assert test-gate-status line 1 = "resource_exhaustion"
2. test_eagain_exit254_without_stderr_pattern: Mock exits 254, no EAGAIN output. Assert status = "failed"
3. test_eagain_exit1_with_stderr_pattern: Mock exits 1, outputs EAGAIN pattern. Assert status = "failed" (exit code must be 254)
4. test_eagain_deference_to_existing_passed: Invoke with --source-file, pre-seed test-gate-status with "passed". Mock exits 254 + EAGAIN. Assert status remains "passed" (suite-engine result is authoritative). Must use --source-file to exercise merge path.
5. test_resource_exhaustion_severity_below_failed: Two tests via per-file loop — first fails normally (exit 1), second triggers EAGAIN (exit 254 + pattern). Assert final status = "failed" (failed > resource_exhaustion)
6. test_eagain_blocking_io_error_pattern: Mock exits 254, outputs "BlockingIOError: [Errno 35] Resource temporarily unavailable". Assert status = "resource_exhaustion"
7. test_merge_path_resource_exhaustion_then_failed: Two --source-file invocations — first produces resource_exhaustion, second produces normal failure. Assert merged status = "failed"

Also update .test-index to map record-test-status.sh to the new test file.

## Files to Modify
- tests/hooks/test-record-test-status-eagain.sh (CREATE)
- .test-index (EDIT — add mapping)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test file tests/hooks/test-record-test-status-eagain.sh exists
  Verify: test -f tests/hooks/test-record-test-status-eagain.sh
- [ ] Test file contains at least 7 test functions
  Verify: grep -c "^test_" tests/hooks/test-record-test-status-eagain.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 7)}'
- [ ] All tests FAIL against current code (RED phase)
  Verify: bash tests/hooks/test-record-test-status-eagain.sh 2>&1; test $? -ne 0
- [ ] .test-index contains mapping for new test file
  Verify: grep -q "test-record-test-status-eagain.sh" .test-index
- [ ] No syntax errors in test file
  Verify: bash -n tests/hooks/test-record-test-status-eagain.sh

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Done ✓ — Files: tests/hooks/test-record-test-status-eagain.sh, .test-index. Tests: RED (4 principal assertions fail as expected).
comments.author: Test
